text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pathetic... But, I have to face the facts.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Back in the day, the master of some martial arts
dojo used to come by our house and say...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
"There is mystery in victory, but no mystery in
defeat."

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I think that's right. This defeat was brought on
by my... lack of ability.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I think that's right. This defeat was brought on
by my... lack of ability.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Stop. Don't try to comfort me.

I explain that I don't want her to be too hard on
herself because a poor mental state can interfere
with training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hah! So that's why? In that case, you've got
nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm not as soft as you might think.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I just can't allow myself to forget the bitter
taste of defeat.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and now I'm going to train harder than
ever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Our opponents won't wait for us... They're going
to keep pushing forward too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've got to get ahead of them. It'll be a thorny
road, but I'm ready.
